reason: Human gate rejected the prior strict-complete claim because 2009 and 2013 post-target sources were labeled as ancestors. The source matrix and synthesis now classify those papers as explainers/background, and the ancestor class is supported by locally retrieved and read pre-1992 sources: Jeffreys 1948 and Laplace 1820. Detailed claims still rest on the 1992 MacKay primary, with post-target explainers used only for navigation and formula checks.
human_gate_issue: Prior source matrix mislabeled Robert-Chopin-Rousseau 2009 and Azevedo-Shachter 2013 as ancestors of the 1992 MacKay primary.
correction: Moved the 2009 and 2013 files to refs/explainers; added and read Jeffreys 1948 Theory of Probability and Laplace 1820 Theorie analytique des probabilites under refs/ancestors; isolated failed full-text attempts under refs/blocked_attempts.
